title: Electric Candle Lighter, 2 Pack Rechargeable USB C Lighters Long Reach for Scented Candle and BBQ, Electronic Plasma Arc Lighter Flameless and Windproof for BBQ Stove and Fireworks
features: Extra Long Flexible Neck ▶ The electric candle lighter’s length is 26cm,longer enough to reach the items you want to ignite. 9cm and 360° rotatable flexible long reach neck for widely use, such as deep cup candles, gas stoves, fireworks, barbecue, camping. This electric lighter is an essential tool for family use

USB C Rechargeable and LED Battery Display▶ Toss those disposable lighters in the trash,embrace a greener life with our rechargeable lighter. The real-time LED battery display lets you always know the remaining power, only one hour for full charge can provide 500+ ignitions

Safety Protection & Design ▶ [Child Safety Lock]: You need to slide out the safety lock first, then press the button to generate arc. After sliding out the safety lock, if the usb lighter is not used in 10s, the lighter will automatically power off. [6s Auto Off] the spark will stop automatically after 7 seconds of ignition, which is also designed for over-heating, for safe considertion

Christmas Stocking Fillers for Women ▶ This electric candle lighter is an ideal Christmas stocking stuffer for women, perfectly designed for igniting scented candles, an exquisite and considerate Christmas gift for women mom girlfriend, making it a beautiful and functional accessory for home

Wind & Splash Proof ▶ This candle lighters long reach adopts plasma arc windproof flameless technology, instead of using butane, no flame, eco-friendy& resuable, it's the best choose for indoor and outdoor activities

Warranty ▶ 180 days guarantee,if you aren't love our electronic candle lighter or any questions, please free to contact us, we are ready to help, we will give a suitable solution. You’ll receive a nice box comes with: candle lighter*2; usb charging cable*2; user manual*1
